subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Lord of existence and Ruler over the hidden and the manifest. How can I enumerate Thy praise and by what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا اله الوجود و الحاکم فی السر و الشهود کیف احصی ثنائک و بای
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
